contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 50
- Description: Edgar->dao_protocol PR4 ramp: flip /agroverse_shop/shipping_rates to Python (+ add global CORS)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/44
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1067
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/213
  
  Details:
  Ramped PR4 of the Edgar -> dao_protocol migration: /agroverse_shop/shipping_rates now proxies to the dao_protocol FastAPI service (:8010) instead of Rails (EasyPost USPS rates). Caught a prerequisite first: the endpoint is a browser fetch from agroverse.shop, and the Python app had no CORS while Rails returns access-control-allow-origin:* via global rack-cors. Added Starlette CORSMiddleware mirroring Edgar exactly (origins *, all methods, no creds, max-age 7200) as dao_protocol#44, deployed, then flipped via an exact-match nginx location block (backup, nginx -t, reload). Verified live: rate JSON byte-identical to Rails (GroundAdvantage 6.24 / Priority 13.48 / Express 47.63), ACAO:* on GET + OPTIONS preflight, dao_protocol journal-confirmed. Live conf mirrored to sentiment_importer/config/nginx.conf (#1067). 3 of 6 routes now ramped (PR2/PR3/PR4); rollback = drop the location block + reload. Remaining: PR5 /dao + PR6 qr-code/stripe.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 83.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
